name: XP Selection Fundo De Fundos De Investimento Imobiliario - FII
summary: XP Selection Fundo De Fundos De Investimento Imobiliario - FII is a fund of funds that invests in other real estate investment funds (FIIs). The fund aims to provide investors with a diversified portfolio of real estate assets through its holdings in various FIIs. It seeks to generate income and capital appreciation by strategically allocating its capital across different real estate sectors and fund managers.
